# H++ — Evolving Human Resources
> Wessam Abdelmajeed | HR Business Partner & Talent Strategist

## About
H++ is the professional practice of Wessam Abdelmajeed, a senior HR Business Partner and Talent Strategist with a proven track record across the MENA region. H++ delivers innovative HR consulting, talent acquisition, organisational development, and training services to companies that put people first.

## Services
- HR Consulting & Advisory — strategic HR frameworks, policy design, HR roadmaps
- Recruitment & Talent Acquisition — end-to-end hiring, employer branding, talent pipelines
- Organisational Development — org design, culture, performance management, succession planning
- Training & Employee Experience — leadership development, onboarding, engagement

## Contact
- Website: https://hplusplus.net
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/wessam-abd-el-majeed
- Email: hello@hplusplus.net

## Content
The Insights blog at /insights publishes practical HR thinking covering strategy, recruitment, leadership, culture, and the MENA market.
